name: golang-github-klauspost-cpuid-dev
title: golang-github-klauspost-cpuid-dev
description:
CPU feature identification for Go
Package cpuid provides information about the CPU running the
current program. CPU features are detected on startup, and kept
for fast access through the life of the application.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-klauspost-cpuid-dev because CPU feature identification for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-klauspost-cpuid-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-klauspost-cpuid-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-klauspost-cpuid-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
